prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog cover illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor: red hair, black outfit, small cross motif, black/red/white palette. The article idea comes first; Avilia must act inside the scene.

Scene: a huge clean wave made of code snippets and AI chat bubbles is rolling toward a small programmer desk. Avilia stands at the desk, not panicking, holding a dark red steering staff and turning the wave into organized project cards. The feeling is "AI is rushing in; instead of being washed away, learn to ride and direct it."

Composition: strong first-viewport cover image, lots of white space, dynamic diagonal wave from left to right, Avilia near the center foreground. Minimal handwritten Chinese labels: "AI 浪潮", "驾驭", "先做出来".

Style: clean editorial blog illustration, cute but not childish, black lines, white background, dark red accents, small blue only for AI/system glow. No large title text, no top-left category label, no PPT style, no commercial poster.
